sentences.target: Le sergent arrive avec les pompiers.

translations.fr: Le sergent arrive avec les pompiers.
translations.en: The sergeant arrives with the firefighters.
translations.es: El sargento llega con los bomberos.
translations.de: Der Sergeant kommt mit den Feuerwehrleuten.
translations.it: Il sergente arriva con i vigili del fuoco.
translations.zh-Hans: 中士与消防员一起到达。
translations.yue: 中士與消防員一起到達。
translations.pt: O sargento chega com os bombeiros.
translations.vi: Trung sĩ đến cùng với lính cứu hỏa.
translations.nl: De sergeant komt met de brandweerlieden.
translations.hi: सार्जेंट दमकलकर्मियों के साथ पहुंचता है.
translations.el: Ο λοχίας φτάνει με τους πυροσβέστες.
translations.id: Sersan tiba bersama para pemadam kebakaran.
translations.ja: 軍曹が消防士と一緒に到着する。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of the head noun 'sergent' (subject).
Common noun (military rank), masculine singular; subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with 'sergent'.
Preposition introducing a comitative complement.
Definite article, plural; determiner of 'pompiers'.
Common noun, plural; object of the preposition 'avec'.

sentences.target: Mon cousin est sergent dans l'armée.

translations.fr: Mon cousin est sergent dans l'armée.
translations.en: My cousin is a sergeant in the army.
translations.es: Mi primo es sargento en el ejército.
translations.de: Mein Cousin ist Sergeant in der Armee.
translations.zh-Hans: 我堂兄是军队里的中士。
translations.ru: Мой двоюродный брат — сержант в армии.
translations.pt: Meu primo é sargento no exército.
translations.he: בן דוד שלי הוא סמל בצבא.
translations.vi: Anh họ tôi là trung sĩ trong quân đội.
translations.nl: Mijn neef is sergeant in het leger.
translations.uk: Мій двоюрідний брат — сержант в армії.
translations.hi: मेरा चचेरा भाई सेना में सार्जेंट है.
translations.pl: Mój kuzyn jest sierżantem w wojsku.
translations.el: Ο ξάδερφός μου είναι λοχίας στον στρατό.
translations.nb: Min fetter er sersjant i hæren.
translations.id: Sepupu saya adalah sersan di militer.
translations.sv: Min kusin är sergeant i armén.
translations.ro: Vărul meu este sergent în armată.
translations.cs: Můj bratranec je seržant v armádě.
translations.da: Min fætter er sergent i hæren.
translations.ja: 私のいतोこは軍隊で軍曹です。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, 1st person singular, masculine singular; modifies 'cousin'.
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of the copular clause.
Copular auxiliary, present indicative, 3rd person singular; links subject to predicate nominal.
Common noun functioning as a predicate nominal (profession/rank).
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Elided definite article before a vowel; determiner of 'armée'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'dans'.

sentences.target: On voit un sergent à la télé.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ vwa œ̃ sɛʁʒɑ̃ a la tele/

translations.fr: On voit un sergent à la télé.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ vwa œ̃ sɛʁʒɑ̃ a la tele/
translations.en: We see a sergeant on TV.
translations.es: Vemos a un sargento en la tele.
translations.de: Wir sehen einen Sergeant im Fernsehen.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在电视上看到一名中士。
translations.yue: 我哋喺電視上見到一位中士。
translations.vi: Chúng tôi thấy một trung sĩ trên TV.
translations.nl: We zien een sergeant op tv.
translations.hi: हम टीवी पर एक सार्जेंट देखते हैं.
translations.nb: Vi ser en sersjant på TV.
translations.id: Kami melihat seorang sersan di TV.
translations.sv: Vi ser en sergeant på tv.
translations.da: Vi ser en sergent i tv.
translations.ja: 私たちはテレビで軍曹を見ます。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/indefinite subject pronoun (often colloquial 'we'); 3rd person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'sergent'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'voit'.
Preposition introducing a locative/media complement ('on TV').
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'télé'.
Common (colloquial) noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'à'.

sentences.target: Je parle au sergent de la situation.
sentences.reading: /ʒə paʁl o sɛʁʒɑ̃ də la sitɥasjɔ̃/

translations.fr: Je parle au sergent de la situation.
translations.ipa: /ʒə paʁl o sɛʁʒɑ̃ də la sitɥasjɔ̃/
translations.en: I talk to the sergeant about the situation.
translations.es: Hablo con el sargento sobre la situación.
translations.de: Ich spreche mit dem Sergeant über die Situation.
translations.it: Parlo con il sergente della situazione.
translations.ru: Я разговариваю с сержантом о ситуации.
translations.pt: Eu falo com o sargento sobre a situação.
translations.he: אני מדבר עם הסמל על המצב.
translations.vi: Tôi nói chuyện với trung sĩ về tình hình.
translations.nl: Ik praat met de sergeant over de situatie.
translations.uk: Я розмовляю із сержантом про ситуацію.
translations.hi: मैं स्थिति के बारे में सार्जेंट से बात करता हूँ.
translations.el: Μιλάω στον λοχία για την κατάσταση.
translations.nb: Jeg snakker med sersjanten om situasjonen.
translations.id: Saya berbicara dengan sersan tentang situasi.
translations.sv: Jag pratar med sergeanten om situationen.
translations.da: Jeg taler med sergenten om situationen.
translations.ja: 私は軍曹に状況について話します。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; intransitive with prepositional complements.
Contraction of 'à' + 'le'; introduces the indirect object NP 'sergent'.
Common noun, masculine singular; complement of the preposition 'à' (indirect object).
Preposition introducing the topic/content complement.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'situation'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'de'.
